code: import axios from'axios';const axiosClient=axios.create({baseURL:'http://localhost:8080/api',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});axiosClient.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');if(token){config.headers.Authorization=`Bearer ${token}`;}return config;},error=>Promise.reject(error));axiosClient.interceptors.response.use(response=>response,error=>{if(error.response&&error.response.status===401){localStorage.clear();if(window.location.pathname!=='/login'){window.location.href='/login';}}return Promise.reject(error);});export default axiosClient;
